flask-api.title: Flask REST API
flask-api.desc: Production-ready Flask REST API boilerplate with JWT auth, rate limiting, and SQLAlchemy ORM integration.

web-scraper.title: Async Web Scraper
web-scraper.desc: High-performance async web scraper using aiohttp and BeautifulSoup with proxy rotation and retry logic.

discord-bot.title: Discord Bot Framework
discord-bot.desc: Modular Discord bot with slash commands, event handlers, cog system, and database integration.

data-pipeline.title: ETL Data Pipeline
data-pipeline.desc: Extract-Transform-Load pipeline with pandas, scheduled jobs, data validation, and CSV/JSON/SQL output.

fastapi-ws.title: FastAPI WebSocket Server
fastapi-ws.desc: Real-time WebSocket server with room management, broadcast, and connection pooling via FastAPI.

cli-tool.title: CLI Framework
cli-tool.desc: Rich CLI application builder with argument parsing, colored output, progress bars, and interactive prompts.
